info.name: Factset Delete All Entries for a Symbol or Specific Date Entries for a Symbol From a Previously Created Account.

params.name: name
params.description: The filename of model account to delete

params.name: symbol
params.description: The symbol from the given file name to delete

params.name: dates
params.description: The dates from the given file name and symbol to delete (Maximum 10 dates are allowed)
